summary: M5 Module Testing Complete - Both Cancelación and Inscripción flows verified. M5 card visible and enabled on Mutaciones page. Dialog opens with two subtipo options. For 'Inscripción de Predio Nuevo', the embedded modal opens DIRECTLY within the M5 form (not redirect) after selecting municipio. The 'Crear Predio Nuevo' modal has all required fields. Backend endpoint POST /api/predios/m5/crear works correctly. After successful creation, modal closes and predio is auto-selected in M5 form.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: M5 card visible with 'Mutación Quinta' title and 'Cancelación o inscripción de predio' description
VERIFIED: M5 card is ENABLED (not grayed out like M6)
VERIFIED: M5 dialog shows two options: 'Cancelación de Predio' and 'Inscripción de Predio Nuevo'
VERIFIED: When 'Inscripción' selected, '+ Crear Predio Nuevo' button appears after municipio selection
VERIFIED: Clicking '+ Crear Predio Nuevo' opens EMBEDDED modal (not redirect) with title 'Crear Predio Nuevo - {municipio}'
VERIFIED: Modal has 'Código Predial Nacional (30 dígitos)' section with municipio code (54344 for Hacarí)
VERIFIED: Code builder has fields: Zona, Sector, Comuna, Barrio, Manzana, Terreno, Cond., Edificio, Piso+Unidad
VERIFIED: 'Datos del Predio' section with: Matrícula, Destino, Dirección*, Área Terreno*, Área Construida, Avalúo Catastral*
VERIFIED: 'Propietario' section with: Nombre*, Tipo Doc, Documento
VERIFIED: Backend POST /api/predios/m5/crear returns {id, codigo_predial_nacional, codigo_homologado, numero_predio}
VERIFIED: After creation, modal closes and 'Predio a Inscribir' badge appears with predio selected
VERIFIED: Toast 'Predio creado exitosamente' shown on success
VERIFIED: 'Cancelación de Predio' flow has: Buscar Predio a Cancelar, doble inscripción checkbox, Vigencia desde la cual se cancela
seed_data_creation: Test predios created via API and UI for validation (codigo contains TEST in name)
context_for_next_testing_agent: M5 module fully tested and working. Supports two subtipos: 'cancelacion' (search and select existing predio to cancel) and 'inscripcion' (create new predio via embedded modal or search existing). The embedded modal for predio creation opens within M5 form (not redirect) and auto-selects created predio.

frontend_ui_tests.m5_card_visible: PASS - Shows 'M5' badge and 'Mutación Quinta' title
frontend_ui_tests.m5_card_enabled: PASS - Not grayed out (M6 shows 'Próximamente' as disabled)
frontend_ui_tests.m5_dialog_opens: PASS - Click opens dialog without error
frontend_ui_tests.m5_subtipo_inscripcion: PASS - 'Inscripción de Predio Nuevo' option works
frontend_ui_tests.m5_municipio_dropdown: PASS - Shows all 12 municipalities (tested Hacarí, Sardinata)
frontend_ui_tests.m5_crear_predio_button: PASS - Green '+ Crear Predio Nuevo' button appears after municipio selection
frontend_ui_tests.m5_embedded_modal: PASS - Modal opens WITHIN M5 form (not redirect)
frontend_ui_tests.m5_modal_codigo_section: PASS - '30 dígitos' code builder with municipio prefix
frontend_ui_tests.m5_modal_datos_predio: PASS - Matrícula, Destino, Dirección, Área fields present
frontend_ui_tests.m5_modal_propietario: PASS - Nombre, Tipo Doc, Documento fields present
frontend_ui_tests.m5_predio_creation: PASS - Predio created successfully via modal
frontend_ui_tests.m5_auto_selection: PASS - Created predio auto-selected with 'Predio a Inscribir' badge

backend_api_tests.POST /api/predios/m5/crear: PASS - Returns {id, codigo_predial_nacional, codigo_homologado, numero_predio, message}

cancelacion_flow_tests.cancelacion_option: PASS - Form shows correct fields for cancellation
cancelacion_flow_tests.vigencia_cancelacion: PASS - 'Vigencia desde la cual se cancela' dropdown present
cancelacion_flow_tests.buscar_predio_cancelar: PASS - Search field for finding predio to cancel
cancelacion_flow_tests.doble_inscripcion: PASS - Checkbox '¿Es cancelación por doble inscripción?' present
cancelacion_flow_tests.no_crear_button: PASS - 'Crear Predio Nuevo' button NOT shown in Cancelación (correct)

features_verified: 1. M5 card visible on Mutaciones y Resoluciones page
2. M5 dialog shows two subtipos: Cancelación and Inscripción
3. Inscripción: '+ Crear Predio Nuevo' button appears after municipio selection
4. Embedded modal opens WITHIN M5 form (NOT redirect to another page)
5. Modal shows 30-digit código predial nacional builder
6. Modal has Dirección, Área Terreno, Área Construida, Avalúo fields
7. Modal has Propietario section (nombre, tipo doc, documento)
9. After successful creation, modal closes and predio is auto-selected
10. Cancelación flow has predio search and doble inscripción option
